text.title: Puppeteer Agent Workflow Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml for puppeteer-agent-workflow.

conclusion.verdict: bash_worker invocation; script writes artifact to disk; agent reads only artifact path
queue_daemon; agent enqueues jobs and polls for artifacts; never holds the browser in turn
pause and surface screenshot; never silent retry
switch to attribute-based selectors using page.content() inspection

text.example: shape=one_off_task → bash_worker writes JSON to /tmp/agent-run/result.json; scrubber masks Authorization headers; timeout 60s. Rule: bash-not-inline.
